creator: skreuzer@f2o.org
text:
The following ports have no maintainer:

security/p5-Crypt-Anubis
security/p5-Crypt-Cryptix
security/p5-Crypt-HCE_SHA
security/p5-Crypt-OFB
security/p5-Crypt-OTP
security/p5-Crypt-RC4
security/p5-Crypt-RandPasswd
security/p5-Crypt-Rijndael
security/p5-Crypt-Solitaire
security/p5-Crypt-TripleDES
security/p5-Crypt-UnixCrypt

Since I use a few of those, I figured I would adopt the whole lot.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
